question: The chart shows the product rating share by category. Based on the percentage labels, which statement is correct?

options.A: Support has the highest rating share among all categories.
options.B: Quality and Delivery have almost the same rating share.
options.C: Delivery has the highest rating share among all categories.
options.D: Design has a higher rating share than Support.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
